name: insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, delays in claim approvals cause client dissatisfaction. We automate tracking and escalation alerts instead of manual tracking of claim statuses and follow-ups.
problem_solved: Delays in insurance claim approvals lead to escalated client issues and dissatisfaction.
